description: consolidated city and county in California, United States
description_wiki: San Francisco, officially the City and County of San Francisco, is the fourth-most populous city in California and the 17th-most populous in the United States, with a population of 826,079 in 2025.
Mexico, officially the United Mexican States, is a country in North America.

description: capital of the State of Jalisco, Mexico
description_wiki: Guadalajara ( GWAH-də-lə-HAR-ə, Spanish: [ɡwaðalaˈxaɾa] ) is the capital and the most populous city in the western Mexican state of Jalisco, as well as the most densely populated municipality in Jalisco.

aliases: Free and sovereign state of Jalisco
description_wiki: Jalisco, officially the Free and Sovereign State of Jalisco, is one of the 31 states which, along with Mexico City, comprise the 32 Federal Entities of Mexico.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: California () is a state in the Western United States that lies on the Pacific Coast.

description: southern and Central Mexican bullriding sports
description_wiki: The word Jaripeo  (Spanish: [xaɾiˈpeo] ) refers to a form of rodeo, particularly bull riding practiced in some Latin American countries.

Rodeo (  ROH-dee-oh or  rə-DAY-oh) is a competitive equestrian sport that arose out of the working practices of cattle herding in Spain and Mexico, expanding throughout the Americas and to other nations.
